data.biography: Η Shao Yuqi, γεννημένη στις 4 Ιουνίου, αποφοίτησε από την Ακαδημία Κινηματογράφου του Πεκίνου, ηθοποιός κινηματογράφου και τηλεόρασης στην ηπειρωτική Κίνα.

Ji Shuyi, formerly Shao Yuqi, is a mainland film and television actress, born on June 4, 2000 in Henan. In 2019, she enrolled in the undergraduate class of the Acting Department of the Beijing Film Academy. She officially entered the show business circle with her lead role in the short length drama "Buff in Love" and supporting role in "Flight to You."
data.name: Ji Shuyi

data.biography:
邵羽柒，出生于6月4日，毕业于北京电影学院，中国内地影视女演员。

2022年12月26日，邵羽柒主演的都市励志剧《向风而行》播出。
data.name: 邵羽柒

data.biography:
邵羽柒，出生於 6 月 4 日，畢業於北京電影學院，中國內地影視女演員。

2022 年 12 月 26 日，邵羽柒主演的都市勵志劇《向風而行》播出。
data.name: 邵羽柒

data.biography: Choi Kwang Il is a South Korean actor. He made his acting debut in 2001.
data.name: Choi Gwang-il

data.biography: Asim Chaudhry (Punjabi: عاصم چودھری) is an English comedian, writer, director and actor best known for playing Chabuddy G in the BBC mockumentary series People Just Do Nothing, which he co-created. For this role, he won a Royal Television Society Award and was nominated for two British Academy Television Awards.
data.name: Asim Chaudhry

data.biography: 阿西姆·乔杜里（旁遮普语：عاصمچودھری）是一位英国喜剧演员、作家、导演和演员
data.name: 阿西姆·乔杜里

data.biography: 阿西姆·喬杜裏（旁遮普語：عاصمچودھری）是一位英國喜劇演員、作家、導演和演員
data.name: 阿西姆·喬杜裏

data.biography:
Marcial Andrés Tagle Concha (born January 3, 1973), is a Chilean film and television actor.

He became well known for the TV show "Casado con hijos" (2006), -an adaptation of the American show "Married with Children"- where he played the character of"Pablo Pinto". The following year, he starred in the telenovela Fortunato, an adaptation of Los Roldán and years later, the TV series "Graduados", adapted from the TV series of the same name.
data.name: Marcial Tagle
